-----------   Box.Pro

{"lsm6dsv16x_mlc":{"enable":true}}
{"lsm6dsv16x_mlc":{"enable":false}}

{"lsm6dsv16x_acc":{"enable":true}}
{"lsm6dsv16x_gyro":{"enable":true}}

{"lsm6dsv16x_acc":{"enable":false}}
{"lsm6dsv16x_gyro":{"enable":false}}

{"log_controller*start_log":{"interface":0}}	

{"get_status":"lsm6dsv16x_acc"}
{"get_status":"lsm6dsv16x_gyro"}
{"get_status":"lsm6dsv16x_mlc"}

/* to set acc ODR */
{"lsm6dsv16x_acc":{"odr":2}}
{"lsm6dsv16x_gyro":{"odr":2}}

{"lsm6dsv16x_acc":{"fs":2}}
{"lsm6dsv16x_gyro":{"fs":2}}

-----------  iks5a1

{"ism6hg256x_acc":{"enable":true}}
{"ism6hg256x_gyro":{"enable":true}}

{"ism6hg256x_acc":{"odr":2}}
{"ism6hg256x_gyro":{"odr":2}}

{"ism6hg256x_acc":{"fs":2}}
{"ism6hg256x_gyro":{"fs":2}}

{"ism6hg256x_acc":{"enable":true}}
{"ism6hg256x_gyro":{"enable":true}}


/* cmd sequence to start MLC inference from dft MLC file in .h */

{"lsm6dsv16x_mlc":{"enable":true}}
{"lsm6dsv16x_mlc*load_model":{"arguments":{"filename": "asset_tracking_lsm6dsv16x_mlc.ucf","size":520,"content":""}}}
{"log_controller*start_log":{"interface":0}}
